posts.author: Domyx (Kris)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a repeating projects so it’s important for me to automate timelines.

Basically I created two automations:

  1. by changing the first items Timeline the other item timelines adjust automatically.
  2. by changing the first subitems Timeline the other item timelines adjust automatically.
    Screenshot, if anybody is interested.

image1322×664 56.5 KB

The problem is that our projects are agile and sometimes dates change. It would not be a problem if I could link together Item and Subitem dependencies, but it’s not possible.

I saw this discussed in a few places and one year ago this was said to be implemented by Monday.com team. I cannot find solution for this, can anybody advise please?
